title: Trail Menorca Camí de Cavalls
description: Menorca's great mountain race, now in its 14th edition, follows the historic Camí de Cavalls (GR-223) that rings the island. It draws around 3,000 runners from dozens of countries across eight distances, from 11 km to the full 185 km loop. The flagship race is a UTMB qualifier. Places usually sell out months in advance.
